calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior
Plaintiff: Nasir Patel and James Anthony Garcia, are present in pro per.
Parties settled, terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendants for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 554 Broadway #35, San Francisco, CA.
If Defendants vacated as agreed no later then 5:00 P.M. on July 14, 2005, under broom clean condition, Plaintiff will waive all back rent and damages in the amount of $1,485.00
If Defendants fail to vacate, Plaintiff will be entitled to entry of Judgment against Defendants upon Ex Parte application and declaration with 24-hour notice to Defendants
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Each party waives claim against the other.
Parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-05-2005 Continued To Jul-11-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
